note: Source of truth for the quickfire index. Add an artifact = add an entry here. type/subjects/status must come from the controlled vocabulary below; adding a new vocab term is a deliberate edit, not an ad-hoc tag. status: active=shown at rest, archived=hidden until 'Show all', hidden=dev/junk kept out of the default view (still reachable via Show all). reviewed:false = auto-surfaced folder with inferred tags, needs a human pass.

artifacts.title: Side Play Board — 21 Concepts
artifacts.desc: Comparative board of 21 side-business ideas from three models, scored on burst/moat/cash, with competitor research on the top three (venue twins, workspace consulting, script breakdown).

artifacts.title: Garage Registry Dashboard
artifacts.desc: Vehicle registration + insurance dashboard for Dad: fielded records, expiry flags, one Drive doc folder per vehicle. NFC-tag ready. v2 direction (sharpened, database-field style).

artifacts.title: From Garum to Colatura
artifacts.desc: Roman garum to Cetara colatura: salt history, how it's made, five recipes, and where to buy.

artifacts.title: The Atomic Trail
artifacts.desc: TVA nuclear history + Manhattan Project road-trip planner, sparked flying CHI→CHA.

artifacts.title: Custom Field Catalog
artifacts.desc: Permanent build record of write-once custom-field artifacts (dropdowns, labels), tagged by ClickUp list.

artifacts.title: iPhone Home Screen Plan
artifacts.desc: Three-page iPhone layout: sunset backdrop, one-job widgets, apps sorted into zone folders. Build-order included.

artifacts.title: Live Data Connectivity — Transcript
artifacts.desc: Full session log: HTML apps to live data via a Cloudflare Worker proxy, landing on the URITP Safety Suite build.

artifacts.desc: Full-screen July 4th countdown with tap-to-launch fireworks; auto-rolls to next year.
